pageContext.name: Evanescence
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are proud to present the Evanescence Fine Art Print!  This officially licensed art print celebrates their latest album, The Bitter Truth, which has been adapted into one of the stories from the Comic Anthology 'Echoes from the Void' and incorporates iconography and symbolism drawn from the album. A glimpse of things to come...  Music fans and Art lovers, be sure to add this dreamy print to your Evanescence gallery today!
